recommended_correction: Re-score the oracle on all 96 holdout tokens (or score masked on the same 16) before quoting any headroom fraction; the 0.5733 figure is not like-for-like and must be withdrawn or recomputed. Replace the even/odd first-appearance split with a randomized token-id split, or drop the train-vs-holdout overfitting narrative - the zero-parameter masked arm shows the same 50 pct gap. Fix the 1000x bias-BPW arithmetic in the summary prose. The NEGATIVE verdict itself (no student beats masking on held-out ids at layer 0, K=64) is reproducible and stands.

refutations.finding: oracle scored on 16 tokens, masked baseline on 96; the 16 are a biased head subset

overfitting diagnosis unsupported: the only fitted object in the masked arm (survivor set) generalizes to 0.13 pct, yet masked error inflates 50 pct train->holdout; the even/odd first-appearance split is not exchangeable
claim prose states bias delta 0.000000000409 BPW / total 0.948410027409; correct value is 4.094368619556723e-07 / 0.948410436436862 (code and JSON are right, the summary is 1000x off)
lowrank charged 50053120 bits for a delta that folds into the already-native router rows exactly as `full` does (charged 0). Over-charge, safe direction, but inconsistent.

oracle lower-bound assert is vacuous (D=8, TOP_K=8 -> LS over 8 vectors spans R^8, oracle==0); and a softmax temperature mutation (logit scale 1.7x), which moves every reported number, passes the self-check silently. 4/5 other mutations caught.

negative rests on ONE layer with an admittedly wrong (attention-free) input; the only other layer measured (46) has the bias arm BEATING masking (-1.3 pct rel) and is discounted as machinery. K=32 never run.
